历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for the science group were approximately 5494 → 10084 → 14116 → 6865 → 6184, with significant fluctuations: a sharp drop in 2022, continued drop in 2023, sharp rise in 2024, and continued rise in 2025, showing a clear upward trend in the last two years, with a baseline of about 6184 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for the science group in Inner Mongolia: 42 in 2021, 44 in 2022, 42 in 2023, 41 in 2024, 44 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 50, an increase of about 13.6% compared to 2025, and the increase in slots will alleviate some competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 66th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 65–76 range in recent years, and is a nationally renowned specialized finance and economics institution; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, mainly involving management topics such as the appointment-based campus entry policy, with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 92nd, rated as average, with moderately low exposure on short video platforms; no record of enrollment gaps in recent years; fifth round of discipline evaluation: Applied Economics A+ (top in the country), Business Administration A, Statistics A-, with outstanding strength in finance and economics disciplines, providing stable appeal for applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science recommended in 2024, Electronic Information/Communication highly recommended in 2024, Electrical Engineering and Automation highly recommended in 2024; these popular science and engineering majors have cross-appeal with SWUFE's enrollment majors such as Financial Technology, Statistics, and Computer Science; the total number of college entrance exam takers in Inner Mongolia in 2026 is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (about 116,000), with an estimated 111,000 physics category candidates based on historical proportions, significantly expanding the competition base; Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, in the southwestern region, which is an inter-provincial study for Inner Mongolia candidates; the university's enrollment share in Inner Mongolia is about 1.5%–2.7%, a small scale, with limited impact from regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 6184, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 13.6% easing competition, the significant increase of about 32% in the total number of Inner Mongolia candidates expanding the application base, the differentiation in popularity of finance and economics majors but SWUFE's disciplinary strength still attractive, and the continuous upward trend in rankings in recent years, it is expected that the lowest admission ranking for the science group in 2026 will slightly drop (ranking number increases) compared to 2025, with a predicted lowest ranking of about 6740, in the range of 6240–7240.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6240–7240, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 6200), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as Accounting (CPA direction) and Basic Disciplines Top Talent Experimental Class; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 7200), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors, prioritizing SWUFE's core majors such as Finance and Finance and Taxation, and seek opportunities for major streaming or minor programs after enrollment.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the liberal arts group were approximately 782 → 1052 → 1592 → 1811 → 1182, showing a fluctuating and then declining trend. After two consecutive years of decline in 2023–2024, the ranking significantly rebounded to 1182 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 600 places in the past three years. The university's enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Inner Mongolia: 26 in 2021, 24 in 2022, 26 in 2023, 25 in 2024, 27 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 22, a reduction of about 18.5% compared to 2025, and the decrease in slots will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 66th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 65–76 range in recent years, making it a nationally renowned specialized finance and economics institution. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, mainly involving management topics such as appointment policies for campus visits, with no significant negative public opinion. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 92, rated as average, with medium to low exposure on short video platforms and no high-attention signals. No records of enrollment gaps in recent years. Fifth round of discipline evaluation: Applied Economics A+ (top in the country), Business Administration A, Statistics A-, with outstanding strength in finance and economics disciplines, providing stable appeal for applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of finance/accounting/economics majors in 2024 is characterized by divergence and wait-and-see, with a slight increase compared to 2023, but still in a state of divergence overall. High-end finance and economics majors at prestigious institutions still have strong appeal. The total number of Inner Mongolia 2026 college entrance examination candidates is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 116,000). Based on historical proportions, it is estimated that there are about 43,000 candidates in the liberal arts group, significantly expanding the competition base. Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, in the southwestern region, which is an inter-provincial study destination for Inner Mongolia candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is about 1.5%–2.7%, a small scale, with limited impact from regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1182, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 18.5% leading to intensified competition, the significant increase of about 32% in the total number of Inner Mongolia candidates expanding the applicant base, and the divergence in popularity of finance and economics majors but the strong disciplinary appeal of SWUFE, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for the liberal arts group in 2026 will move forward (ranking number decreases) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1081, with a range of 811–1351.

If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 1300), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors, aiming to enter the SWUFE platform and then adjust your direction through internal major selection or minor programs.
